entry.title: What Comes After July
entry.summary: July 4 I fly back to Taiwan. July 5 I sit the JLPT N2 exam. After that? I honestly don't know yet. Here's what I'm thinking.

summaries.en: July 4 I fly back to Taiwan. July 5 I sit the JLPT N2 exam. After that? I honestly don't know yet. Here's what I'm thinking.
